text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. After brushing my teeth, I have a light breakfast and drink a cup of coffee while reading the news. My work starts at 9 a.m., and I usually finish around 5 p.m. I have lunch at my desk most days. After work, I go for a 30-minute run in the park to stay healthy. In the evening, I cook dinner, watch a TV show, or call my family. I try to go to bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine helps me stay consistent and feel productive every day.
